text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Did someone say something? Anyone
theeere?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... That's strange. It felt like someone was
calling me over here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's the Three Goddesses! Hi there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Do any of you know who was calling for me?
